title: Cuneiform Tablet #0698: Neo-Babylonian Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
